newsSince: Credo's fundamental catalyst - the June 1 FY26 Q4 beat (EPS $1.16 vs $0.98; record $1.34B FY26 revenue, +206% YoY) and FY27 guide with optical portfolio >$600M - predates the June 9 window and was already in the prior case. Since June 9 the news is sentiment/discovery: a wave of analyst PT hikes (Needham $275, Roth $300) and disclosure that Credo is engaged with 5 of 6 hyperscalers. Stock +15% to fresh highs.

sources.label: CRDO draws bullish targets after AI quarter (StocksToTrade)
Credo earns new analyst upgrade, shares climb to peak (Insider Monkey)
Credo Q4 FY26 record results (Yahoo Finance)

verdicts.rankRationale: This page rewards picks-and-shovels with low visibility. Fundamentals are excellent but the FY26 beat/FY27 guide predate June 9; post-window flow is PT hikes and the 5-of-6 hyperscaler disclosure, which mark completed discovery, not fresh fundamentals. Consensus-owned at $51B - hold, no delta.
verdicts.bull: AEC/optical DSP leader; 5 of 6 hyperscalers; FY27 optical >$600M; +206% FY26 revenue.
verdicts.neutral: Best-in-class execution but now fully discovered with PTs $275-300.
verdicts.bear: Revenue concentration; consensus-owned $51B cap; residual hidden alpha shrinking.

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO lens already took the crowding penalty (slid 21->42, flags 'high multiple after repricing'). No new fundamental since June 1; mid-June PT hikes/hyperscaler note are sentiment. DustPhotonics SiPho/CPO option intact. Don't double-count - hold.
verdicts.bull: Cable/connectivity pure play; DustPhotonics adds SiPho/CPO optionality; optical ramping.
verdicts.neutral: On-theme but already re-rated; asymmetry largely captured.
verdicts.bear: High multiple after repricing; revenue concentration on a crowded screen.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the master bottleneck list the AEC/optical-DSP/scale-out exposure is intact and arguably strengthened by FY27 guidance - but all that news predates June 9 and the rank already balances it against the $51B cap and rerating. Mid-June PT hikes nudge valuation recognition only - hold.
verdicts.bull: Scale-out bandwidth via AECs and 800G/1.6T optical DSPs; strong FY27 guide.
verdicts.neutral: Bottleneck exposure intact but already priced after +89% YTD.
verdicts.bear: High multiple; concentration; less hidden alpha post-rerate.
